name: LOGIX: The Missing Part
short_description: A First Person Puzzle Game in which you fix the Logic behind the Puzzle, and then solve the Puzzle to verify what you fixed.
detailed_description:
In LOGIX: The Missing Part, the player has to solve Puzzles which have the Logic missing that makes them work. The Player has to rebuild the Logic for the Puzzles to make them work again, and then solve the Puzzles to verify their functionality.

The Game uses an easy to understand principle of cubes and visual connections to make something complex understandable to everyone, with no programming skills or knowledge required to play through the Game.

There are more than 40 Puzzles in the Game, waiting to have their logic rebuilt, and to be solved.

Feature wise, the game has its primary feature, which allows players to build and control the functionality of puzzles and secondary features like: lasers, physics, objects with different states, movable objects and more.
